sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6705" key="a)naki/dwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνακίδωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀκίς</etym>) <sense id="n6705.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pointless,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.222</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
